birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is also readily found in human-altered habitats such as croplands, irrigated valleys, city parks and gardens, and urban areas. thumb|A West Peruvian dove resting on a wooden rail in a garden, in Elqui River|Valle del Elqui, northern Chile. It is well-suited to colonizing new areas, and West Peruvian doves have been expanding their range further southwards since the 1990s, with records in northwest Argentina suggesting they can successfully cross the Andes
